description:
A request to invoke a tool.

Tool calls represent requests from the AI or user to execute
a specific tool with given arguments.

tool.description: Name of the tool to invoke
tool.title: Tool

args.description: Arguments to pass to the tool
args.title: Args

requested_by.description: Identifier of who/what requested this tool call (user, AI, scheduler)
requested_by.title: Requested By

idempotency_key.description: Optional key to ensure idempotent execution
idempotency_key.title: Idempotency Key

created_at.description: When the tool call was created
created_at.title: Created At

title: ToolCall
